creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
If someone will approve this, I can commit it.  I've tested the -Wno-error is added after the -Werror flag:

--- Makefile    (revision 433893)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -36,6 +36,9 @@
 CFLAGS+=       -Wno-unused-parameter
 # Give i386 a prayer of building, and we can fix the warnings later:
 CFLAGS_i386+=  -Wno-error
+.if ${CC} == gcc6
+CFLAGS+=       -Wno-error
+.endif

 # Avoid conflict with binutils / elftoolchain programs with the same names:
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=       --program-prefix=eu-
